metadata.name: Analyze Impact of a New Bike Lane

description: A new protected bike lane was recently installed. A planner wants to see its impact on traffic speed and cyclist volume.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve historical traffic speed data for the street before and after the bike lane installation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the two datasets for comparison.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve data from bicycle counters along the new lane.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the cyclist volume data.

nodes.task_description: Generate a comparative report showing that vehicle speeds decreased by 5% while cyclist volume increased by 200%.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a report summarizing the project's impact.
